---
title: "Shivang Bhatt"
subtitle: "Welcome to my website!"
image: profile_pic.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:s1bhatt@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivang-bhatt-data
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X / Twitter
      href: https://x.com/swwangg
---

## About Me

Hi! I'm Shivang — a student interested in data science, technology, and building things that matter. I'm currently exploring machine learning, web development, and creative problem-solving.

## Education

**University Name** | B.S. in Your Major | Expected Graduation 2026

## Interests

- Data visualization & storytelling
- Machine learning & AI
- Sports analytics
- Open-source software
